message:
fcp-oauth: actually land redirect_allowlist.rs (follow-up to 76b5cca9 — file dropped from prior commit by index race)

The commit message of 76b5cca9 described this file's content but the file did not make it into the commit's tree (`git show HEAD:crates/fcp-oauth/src/redirect_allowlist.rs` returned "exists on disk, but not in HEAD"). HEAD was therefore broken — lib.rs has `mod redirect_allowlist;` pointing at a missing file. This commit ships only that file.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
